---
title: Titles
---

```{r}
library(gglite)
p = g2(mtcars, hp ~ mpg)
```

## Title and Subtitle via `g2()` Arguments

```{r}
g2(mtcars, hp ~ mpg,
  title = 'Motor Trend Cars', subtitle = 'mpg vs horsepower')
```

## Simple Title

```{r}
p |> title('Motor Trend Cars')
```

## Title with Subtitle

```{r}
p |> title('Motor Trend Cars', subtitle = 'mpg vs horsepower')
```

## Title Alignment

```{r}
p |> title('Right-aligned Title', align = 'right')
```

## Title on a Bar Chart

```{r}
df = data.frame(x = c('A', 'B', 'C', 'D'), y = c(3, 7, 2, 5))
g2(df, y ~ x) |>
  title('Simple Bar Chart', subtitle = 'Categories A-D')
```
